description: Full medical peer review schema for clinical study reports and manuscripts. Simulates a 5-member review panel with distinct expertise roles.

reviewer_roles.label: Editor / Senior Reviewer
reviewer_roles.expertise: Clinical trial design, regulatory strategy, manuscript coherence
reviewer_roles.review_focus: Overall manuscript quality, significance, and fit for target journal/regulatory submission.

reviewer_roles.label: Clinical Methodologist
reviewer_roles.expertise: Study design, bias assessment, causal inference
reviewer_roles.review_focus: Internal and external validity, study design appropriateness, bias risk.

reviewer_roles.label: Domain Clinician
reviewer_roles.expertise: Clinical practice, disease understanding, treatment landscape
reviewer_roles.review_focus: Clinical relevance, practical significance, patient outcome interpretation.

reviewer_roles.label: Biostatistician
reviewer_roles.expertise: Statistical methodology, SAP review, software validation
reviewer_roles.review_focus: Statistical method selection, assumption verification, result interpretation, reproducibility.

reviewer_roles.label: Research Ethicist
reviewer_roles.expertise: Research ethics, informed consent, data privacy, regulatory compliance
reviewer_roles.review_focus: Ethical conduct, informed consent adequacy, data protection, conflicts of interest.

acceptance_dimensions.name: methodology_rigor
acceptance_dimensions.description: Study design, data collection, statistical methods, and analytical approach are scientifically rigorous and appropriate for the research question.

acceptance_dimensions.name: clinical_significance
acceptance_dimensions.description: Findings have meaningful implications for clinical practice, patient outcomes, or disease understanding.

acceptance_dimensions.name: statistical_quality
acceptance_dimensions.description: Statistical analyses are correctly performed, appropriately reported, and results are interpreted accurately.

acceptance_dimensions.name: ethics_compliance
acceptance_dimensions.description: Study meets ethical standards, regulatory requirements, and data protection obligations.

acceptance_dimensions.name: writing_and_presentation
acceptance_dimensions.description: Manuscript is well-organized, clearly written, and adheres to target journal or regulatory formatting requirements.

score_labels.1: Fundamentally flawed; multiple critical design issues

failure_conditions.expression: any mandatory dimension scores <= 2 from any reviewer
majority of reviewers score any mandatory dimension <= 2
majority of reviewers recommend major_revision or reject
all mandatory dimensions score >= 4 from all reviewers and no reviewer recommends rejection
